subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Turn thy face toward him who hath been named Believer, then make mention of him with what [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم ول وجهک شطر من سمی بمومن ثم اذکره بما
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @personal instructions, @call to action
